title: SetSpawn
description: A simple set spawn plugin, easy to use
body:
# **Set Spawn**

SetSpawn known as "SS", is a very simple set spawn plugin. It is very easy to set up.

## **Features**

/SetSpawn sets the spawn for players to teleport to.

/Spawn lets players to go to the specified spawn that the owner has set it to.

## **Permissions**

/SetSpawn = SS.perm
